ad_name: Asiakastarina: Tuntuvat paremmilta kuin 500€ lasit — Naiset 45-54

structure.note: Beautiful clean lifestyle images + natural handheld camera motion. Kling V3 Pro for top-tier animation quality.

avatar_prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a Finnish/Nordic woman, age 50, natural light blonde shoulder-length hair typical Scandinavian style, wearing a soft cream-white knit sweater. Warm genuine smile showing slight surprise, kind light blue Nordic eyes, fair skin with natural freckles. Soft natural daylight from a kitchen window in a cozy Finnish home. Shallow depth of field, creamy warm bokeh. Shot on professional camera, detailed skin texture, minimal natural makeup. Upper body framing, looking directly at camera. 9:16 vertical portrait orientation. High-end lifestyle photography.

talking_head.full_script: Mä maksoin ennen yli viissataa euroa laseista. Sit mä löysin Banaanin. Kahdet lasit, yheksällä kympillä. Nää tuntuu paremmilta ku ne ylihinnotellut viidensadan euron lasit. Ja näiden Hinta-laatusuhde on loistava. Kokeile itekin, banaanieyewear.fi.

script_breakdown.line: Mä maksoin ennen yli viissataa euroa laseista.
Nää tuntuu paremmilta ku ne ylihinnotellut viidensadan euron lasit.

broll_clips.image_prompt: Beautiful eyeglasses displayed on a clean glass shelf inside a modern optician store. Bright even lighting, premium retail environment with glass display cases. The glasses sit elegantly on a clear display stand. Clean, sharp, high-end product photography look. Soft reflections on glass surfaces. No people. No text. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Gentle handheld camera slowly moves past the display, natural subtle movement as if someone is casually browsing the store with their phone

broll_clips.image_prompt: A neatly opened small brown cardboard shipping box on a clean light wooden table. A black glasses case is visible inside, nestled in white tissue paper. Beautiful warm morning sunlight streaming from a window. Clean Nordic Scandinavian kitchen in the background. A fresh coffee cup nearby. Overhead perspective. Warm, inviting, clean aesthetic. High quality lifestyle photography. No people. No text. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Natural handheld movement approaching the open box, gentle excitement of discovery, subtle organic camera motion

broll_clips.image_prompt: Two beautiful pairs of eyeglasses matching the reference photos laid neatly on a clean white linen surface. Warm golden morning light from the side creating soft shadows. Clean, elegant flat-lay composition. Both pairs clearly visible and perfectly presented. High quality lifestyle product photography. No people. No text. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Gentle natural camera drift showing both pairs, subtle organic movement as if admiring them casually

broll_clips.image_prompt: Beautiful close-up of the exact eyeglasses from the reference photo resting open on a warm wooden surface. Gorgeous soft natural daylight creating gentle warm shadows. Frame details clearly visible — clean, pristine condition. Shallow depth of field with warm creamy bokeh background. High quality product photography with natural lifestyle feel. No people. No text. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Slow natural camera movement gently exploring the frame details, subtle handheld drift with warm light

broll_clips.image_prompt: Elegant macro close-up of the eyeglasses frame from the reference photo, showcasing the hinge craftsmanship and material quality. Beautiful warm side lighting catching the metal finish and frame texture. Clean, sharp focus on the details. Soft blurred warm background. Premium product photography quality. No people. No text. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Very subtle natural camera movement revealing the frame quality and craftsmanship, gentle organic drift

broll_clips.image_prompt: The exact eyeglasses from the reference photo resting on an open book next to a beautiful coffee cup on a cozy cream knit blanket. A small green plant nearby. Warm afternoon window light creating a beautiful Nordic hygge atmosphere. Clean, inviting, lifestyle composition. High quality lifestyle photography. No people. No text. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Gentle natural overhead drift across the cozy scene, casual warm movement inviting the viewer in

broll_clips.image_prompt: Three beautiful pairs of eyeglasses from the reference photos arranged elegantly on a clean light surface with a small green succulent and a coffee cup. Bright natural morning light. Clean, aspirational lifestyle composition. All three pairs clearly visible and beautifully presented. High quality lifestyle product photography. No people. No text. 9:16 vertical.
broll_clips.motion_prompt: Gentle overhead camera movement slowly revealing the full collection, natural organic drift
